high_level_description: A wide cinematic 1216 x 832 anime illustration in the style of Akira Toriyama. A chibi mechanic is discovering that a server box labeled grafana-community actually contains old deprecated upstream charts inside. He is pulling off a false label to reveal the real upstream label underneath. Behind him, two new shiny boxes with the Grafana and Tempo logos are being installed. The scene is comedic, cel-shaded, vibrant, and playful.

style_description.aesthetics: Akira Toriyama anime style, Dragon Ball cel-shaded cartoon, bold black outlines, rounded exaggerated proportions, expressive shocked comedic faces, playful technology blog illustration, no photorealism, no 3D render
style_description.lighting: Dramatic spotlight on the false label discovery, warm workshop ambient light, cyan glow from new server LEDs, energetic comedic mood
style_description.medium: digital anime illustration, vector-like clean coloring, bold outlines, technology blog inline art
style_description.art_style: Akira Toriyama, Dr. Slump chibi style, Dragon Ball cel-shaded cartoon

compositional_deconstruction.background: A clean homelab workshop with gray walls and server racks. On the left an old beige server box with a false label. On the right two new shiny black server boxes with glowing LEDs. Floating holographic chart icons drift in the air. A large magnifying glass effect highlights the false label area.

elements.desc: A tall thin chibi human mechanic on the left with brown spiky hair, round glasses, and an orange jumpsuit with a blue cap. He has a huge shocked expression with his mouth wide open and eyes popping. He is peeling off a white label from an old server box with one hand, revealing a different label underneath. His other hand holds a magnifying glass.

An old beige server box in the center-left. On its front is a white label that is being peeled away. The peeled label reads grafana-community. Underneath the peeling label, a dusty old label is visible reading grafana.github.io. The box has dim red deprecated LEDs and looks old.
A new shiny black server box on the right with the official Grafana logo on its front panel, a circular orange swirl logo. It has bright cyan glowing LEDs and looks modern and powerful.
Another new shiny black server box next to the Grafana one, with the Tempo logo on its front, a stylized orange and blue waveform logo. It also has bright cyan LEDs.
A small Toriyama-style robot assistant with a round head and single cyclops eye, holding a clipboard and checking off items. It stands next to the new boxes with a satisfied expression.
The exact text grafana-community in clean lowercase sans-serif letters on the white label being peeled off the old box. Horizontal and front-facing, slightly curled from peeling.
The exact text grafana.github.io in small faded lowercase sans-serif letters on the old dusty label revealed underneath. Horizontal and front-facing.
The exact text DEPRECATED in bold red sans-serif letters on a stamp across the old beige box. Horizontal.
